Uses of Class
edu.uky.cs.nil.sabre.hg.UtilityNode

Packages that use UtilityNode
Package
Description
edu.uky.cs.nil.sabre.hg
Data structures similar to plan graphs that can be used to explore the structure of and estimate important properties of a problem.
edu.uky.cs.nil.sabre.prog
A planner that performs forward (progression) search} through the space of states.

    The utility node this goal will add values to if its condition has a finite cost

    Methods in edu.uky.cs.nil.sabre.hg that return UtilityNode
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    UtilityNode
    HeuristicGraph.getUtility()
    Returns the utility node representing the author's utility if it has been defined.
    UtilityNode
    HeuristicGraph.getUtility(Character character)
    Returns the utility node representing an character's utility if it has been defined.
    protected UtilityNode
    HeuristicGraph.makeUtilityNode(Character character, Conditional<Disjunction<Clause<Precondition>>> conditional)
    This method is used to create all utility nodes so that subclasses of HeuristicGraph have the option to return subclasses of UtilityNode to modify the graph's behavior.
    UtilityNode
    HeuristicGraph.setUtility(Character character, Conditional<Disjunction<Clause<Precondition>>> utility)
    Defines a utility node for the given character using the given utility expression.
    Methods in edu.uky.cs.nil.sabre.hg with parameters of type UtilityNode
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected GoalNode
    HeuristicGraph.makeGoalNode(UtilityNode utility, Conditional<Disjunction<Clause<Precondition>>> label)
    This method is used to create all goal nodes so that subclasses of HeuristicGraph have the option to return subclasses of GoalNode to modify the graph's behavior.
    Constructors in edu.uky.cs.nil.sabre.hg with parameters of type UtilityNode
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
    protected
    GoalNode(UtilityNode utility, Conditional<Disjunction<Clause<Precondition>>> label)
    Constructs a new goal node that represents a given branch of a utility node's expression.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    RelaxedPlanHeuristic.extract(UtilityNode utility, Comparison.Operator operator, Value value)
    Adds nodes from the heuristic graph to the solution subgraph which are needed to make a utility node compare to a value.
